summary: PR 2447 primarily decompiled and improved src/melee/mn/mnevent.c event-menu code, adding several data objects and implementations/partial implementations for event list rendering, event name/time text, event menu setup, and input handling. The bot report recorded two new matches in mnevent, seven unmatched-item improvements, and one .sdata regression. A small src/melee/vi/vi1201v2.c inline helper rename was also included.

key_files.role: Primary decompilation target; added event-menu statics, text/icon setup, user-data setup, list refresh loops, input navigation logic, and matched/improved mnevent functions.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mnevent.c added 436 deleted 12 hunks 3
raw_diff: src/melee/mn/mnevent.c adds mnEvent_8024D15C, mnEvent_8024D5B0, mnEvent_8024E524, fn_8024D864 and modifies fn_8024E1B4
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot reports mnEvent_8024D5B0 and fn_8024E1B4 as new 100% matches, with fn_8024D864, mnEvent_8024D15C, and mnEvent_8024E524 improved

key_files.role: Small inline-helper rename from inline_fn to GET_EVENTDATA while preserving the GObj_Create callsite shape.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/vi/vi1201v2.c added 2 deleted 2 hunks 2
raw_diff: inline HSD_GObj* inline_fn(void) renamed to GET_EVENTDATA(void), callsite updated in un_803207C4

what_changed.text: Added mnevent static Vec3, string/byte arrays, color words, and asset pointer globals including mnEvent_803EF764, mnEvent_803EF770, mnEvent_803EF77C, mnEvent_803EF794, mnEvent_803EF7A0, mnEvent_804D5028, mnEvent_804D502C, mnEvent_804A08F8, and mnEvent_804A0908.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added static data block after mnEvent_803EF758 in src/melee/mn/mnevent.c

what_changed.text: Implemented mnEvent_8024D15C to refresh one event row: finds JObjs 0xA/0xC, computes row position, frees old icon/text objects, creates unlocked event icon GObj/JObj, and writes event number/icon text.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added void mnEvent_8024D15C(s32 idx, s32 event_id)

what_changed.text: Implemented mnEvent_8024D5B0 to replace event name/time text, set text position/color/alignment/font size, query event time/unlocked state, format time strings, and display fallback/placeholder text.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added void mnEvent_8024D5B0(HSD_GObj* gobj, u8 event)
text_corpus: bot report lists mnEvent_8024D5B0 as +560 bytes, 0.00% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: Changed fn_8024E1B4 cleanup logic to use a local tree variable, a GET_EVENTDATA inline accessor, and pointer-stride iteration over nine row slots while freeing gobjs, texts, and icons.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8024E1B4 changed from data->gobjs[i]/texts[i]/icons[i] indexing to iter->... with iter = (MnEventData*) ((u8*) iter + 4)
text_corpus: bot report lists fn_8024E1B4 as +116 bytes, 50.90% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: Implemented mnEvent_8024E524 to create the mnevent GObj, load joint/animation assets, allocate and initialize MnEventData, assert/report allocation failure, position page indicator JObj 0xB, create a proc, populate nine visible event rows, and update selected-event display/animation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added void mnEvent_8024E524(s32 event_idx)
text_corpus: bot report lists mnEvent_8024E524 as +654 bytes, 0.00% to 83.09%

what_changed.text: Implemented fn_8024D864 input handling for cooldown, Back, Confirm, X/Y paging, and Up/Down movement; repeated selection-refresh sequence updates rows, labels, JObj animation, and cursor/display state.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added void fn_8024D864(HSD_GObj* gobj)
text_corpus: bot report lists fn_8024D864 as +1923 bytes, 0.00% to 80.67%

what_changed.text: Renamed vi1201v2.c inline_fn to GET_EVENTDATA and updated one callsite; the helper still returns GObj_Create(0xE, 0xF, 0).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/vi/vi1201v2.c inline helper rename and callsite update

smart_moves.text: The PR used narrow, visible progress chunks: one fully matched text-formatting function, one fully matched cleanup function, and several partially improved larger event-menu functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows 2 new matches and 7 improvements in main/melee/mn/mnevent

smart_moves.text: Repeated nine-row refresh logic was expressed as for-loops in setup, paging, and cleanup paths instead of duplicating nine generated blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for (i = 0; i < 9; i++) loops in fn_8024E1B4, mnEvent_8024E524, and fn_8024D864

smart_moves.text: Existing HSD helpers and macros were used for object creation, JObj translation, text allocation/freeing, user-data ownership, and allocation assertion/reporting rather than raw expanded assert code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: uses GObj_Create, HSD_JObjLoadJoint, HSD_JObjSetTranslateY, HSD_SisLib_803A6754, HSD_SisLib_803A5CC4, GObj_InitUserData, HSD_ASSERTREPORT

decomp_lessons.lesson: For menu code with repeated visible entries, first try natural fixed-count loops for row creation/cleanup/refresh; this PR's nine-entry loops made progress and produced at least one matched cleanup function.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for (i = 0; i < 9; i++) in fn_8024E1B4 and mnEvent_8024E524
text_corpus: fn_8024E1B4 reached 100.00% after cleanup loop rewrite

decomp_lessons.lesson: Use existing HSD assert/report macros when allocation failure behavior includes a real report string and line-like site; this PR used HSD_ASSERTREPORT for user_data allocation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_ASSERTREPORT(0x39B, user_data, "Can't get user_data.\n") in mnEvent_8024E524

decomp_lessons.lesson: Data-section work in a matching PR should be watched carefully: this PR improved .data/.bss/.sdata2/.sbss but the bot also reported a small .sdata regression.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: .data +198, .bss +21, .sdata2 +7, .sbss +4 improvements; .sdata -1 regression

naming_conventions.text: Address-style function and data names were kept for many mnevent symbols where semantics were not established in the PR evidence, e.g. mnEvent_8024D15C, mnEvent_8024D5B0, mnEvent_803EF764.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added and modified address-style mnEvent_* symbols

naming_conventions.text: Local role names such as data, row, tree, icon_gobj, icon_jobj, text, icon_text, first_event, page, and event were used in newly added mnevent code when roles were apparent.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: variable declarations in mnEvent_8024D15C, mnEvent_8024E524, and fn_8024D864

naming_conventions.text: The helper name GET_EVENTDATA is ambiguous in this PR: in mnevent it returns gobj->user_data, while in vi1201v2.c the renamed helper returns GObj_Create(0xE, 0xF, 0). Treat this as PR-local evidence only, not a general naming convention.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: inline MnEventData* GET_EVENTDATA(HSD_GObj* gobj) returns gobj->user_data in mnevent.c
raw_diff: inline HSD_GObj* GET_EVENTDATA(void) returns GObj_Create(0xE, 0xF, 0) in vi1201v2.c

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Introduced local temporaries to keep object pointers and user_data stable across calls, e.g. tree = gobj->hsd_obj and data = GET_EVENTDATA(gobj) in fn_8024E1B4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8024E1B4 declares HSD_JObj* tree and MnEventData* data = GET_EVENTDATA(gobj)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR evidence does not include a human explanation for why these temporaries were necessary; the bot report only supports that fn_8024E1B4 became matched.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used byte-stride pointer iteration over MnEventData row-like storage while also accessing indexed arrays through the original base pointer, likely to fit codegen while preserving base access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8024E1B4 uses tmp = data, iter = data, tmp->gobjs[i], iter->gobjs[0], and iter = (MnEventData*) ((u8*) iter + 4)
raw_diff: mnEvent_8024D15C computes row = (MnEventData*) ((u8*) data + data_offset)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This is a matching tactic with raw pointer arithmetic; if the underlying type/array shape is later recovered, typed fields should be preferred.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Preserved specific casts and narrow integer masks around event IDs in gm_* calls, e.g. u8 casts and & 0xFF masks, in the event-name formatting and selection-refresh paths.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnEvent_8024D5B0 calls gm_801BEBC0(temp_r27 & 0xFF) and gm_801BEB8C(... & 0xFFu)
raw_diff: mnEvent_8024E524 and fn_8024D864 call gm_801BEBA8((u8) (...))
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: No review comment explains these casts; they should be considered observed PR tactics, not a global rule.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: For mnevent data/text additions, the PR kept several literals and byte arrays as static data objects rather than inline literals.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static char mnEvent_803EF77C, mnEvent_803EF788, mnEvent_803EF794, mnEvent_803EF7A0, mnEvent_804D5040, mnEvent_804D5044
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Bot report shows data-section movement including a .sdata regression; source ownership of these literals is not established by PR discussion.

notes: The loaded diff is complete and strongly supports changed-file and code-shape observations.
The bot report supports match/improvement/regression claims but appears to be one report from shortly after PR creation; no later validation output is loaded.
The PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so author intent and reviewer rationale are not evidenced.
Data ownership for added static strings/byte arrays is not explained in PR discussion; treat data-section observations as candidates for curator review, not accepted source facts.
The vi1201v2.c GET_EVENTDATA rename is mechanically evident but semantically unclear because that helper creates a GObj rather than returning event data.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2447 mnevent match progress
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2447, the decomp-dev bot reported two new 100% matches in main/melee/mn/mnevent: mnEvent_8024D5B0 (+560 bytes) and fn_8024E1B4 (+116 bytes). It also reported improvements to fn_8024D864, mnEvent_8024D15C, mnEvent_8024E524, .data, .bss, .sdata2, and .sbss, with a small .sdata regression.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for GALE01 af602cd - 112e3a5

accepted_candidate_records.title: mnevent nine-entry loops
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2447 used fixed nine-iteration loops for event row cleanup/setup/refresh in mnevent, and the cleanup function fn_8024E1B4 reached 100% according to the bot report.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for (i = 0; i < 9; i++) loops
text_corpus: fn_8024E1B4 new match

source_update_candidates.title: mnevent event menu uses nine visible row slots
source_update_candidates.text: The PR code repeatedly refreshes, creates, or cleans up nine event rows in mnevent using for (i = 0; i < 9; i++), with first_event/page controlling selection and paging.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: nine-iteration loops and first_event/page updates in mnevent.c
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help future mnevent curation and searches, but should be verified against current source and surrounding definitions before becoming a path fact.

source_update_candidates.title: mnevent PR added/used GET_EVENTDATA accessor
source_update_candidates.text: In src/melee/mn/mnevent.c, PR 2447 added inline MnEventData* GET_EVENTDATA(HSD_GObj* gobj) returning gobj->user_data and used it in fn_8024E1B4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: inline MnEventData* GET_EVENTDATA(HSD_GObj* gobj) and call in fn_8024E1B4
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-local helper fact; curator should check current source because the same helper name appears with different behavior in vi1201v2.c in this PR.

source_update_candidates.title: Audit PR-local static string/data additions in mnevent
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2447 added several static strings/byte arrays and bot output reported mnevent data-section progress plus a .sdata regression. Curator may want to flag these symbols for later data-ownership review rather than treating the PR as global proof that these literals should be named storage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added static char/string data
text_corpus: bot report data improvements and .sdata regression
source_update_candidates.reason: Relevant to text-before-data and literal/data ownership standards; PR evidence is not enough to accept data ownership facts.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that GET_EVENTDATA is a project-wide naming convention; the PR uses that name for different helper behavior in mnevent.c and vi1201v2.c.

Do not claim all added mnevent functions matched. Bot evidence only reports mnEvent_8024D5B0 and fn_8024E1B4 as new 100% matches; mnEvent_8024D15C, mnEvent_8024E524, and fn_8024D864 were improvements below 100%.
Do not promote the added static strings/byte arrays as accepted data ownership without current-source/symbol/section verification.
No human reviewer intent or approval rationale is available in the loaded slice.
